subcodes.first_line: O heavenly daughter! Thy letter was received. In truth, it was a shell containing the pearls of inner meanings, showing forth the utmost devotion and supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی نامه شما رسید فی الحقیقه صدف لئالی معانی بود نهایت تبتل و تضرع
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
